full_text:
Wu Ban (Yuanxiong) 吳班 (元雄)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Ban (吳班), styledYuanxiong (元雄). Vanguard at Yiling, led naval forces. Later senior general, helps defeat Sima Yi. Wu Ban was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Wu Ban lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
